name: harness-bench
description: Measure agent harnesses (not models): run the same tasks with the same model through claude, cursor-agent, codex, droid, opencode, gemini and compare pass rate, speed, cost, honesty.

scripts.smoke: node bin/harness-bench.mjs calibrate && node bin/harness-bench.mjs run --suite prototype --out runs/smoke
scripts.sdk:smoke: node -e "import('./src/sdk.mjs').then(async m => { const r = await m.runHarnessBench({harnesses:['oracle'], tasks:['01-create-file'], outDir:'runs/sdk-smoke'}); console.log(r.results.length, r.reportPath); })"
